note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left upper arm wound site, rates 9/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Burn burn Left upper arm measures 5.4 cm x 4.4 cm x 0.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 30% slough, 70% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Burn burn Left upper arm — improving.
Plan: Nutritional consult ordered. Physician notified of wound progression.
